title: Trump’s Move to Seize Oil Tankers Costs the U.S. Tens of Millions of Dollars
summary_full: Although President Trump said seizing tankers would be a financial boon, the cost of maintaining just one aging ship has already reached $47 million.
summary_public: Although President Trump said seizing tankers would be a financial boon, the cost of maintaining just one aging ship has already reached $47 million.
